title: Possible sql_catalog corruption due to unclean backuped tail
poc: CREATE TABLE $table (toto TEXT, toto2 TEXT, toto3 TEXT, toto4 TEXT, toto5 TEXT, toto6 TEXT, toto7 TEXT, toto8 TEXT, toto9 TEXT, toto10 TEXT);
key_bug_features: unclean backuped tail causing sql_catalog corruption
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, 'Charlie', -5);
SELECT * FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 0;
